sram.description: Internal SRAM (data bus) — SRAM1 (416 KB) + SRAM2 (64 KB)

sram_ibus.description: Internal SRAM (instruction bus alias) — SRAM0 (32 KB) + SRAM1 alias (416 KB)

rom.description: Internal ROM (instruction bus) — ROM0 (256 KB) + ROM1 (128 KB)

flash_dbus.description: Flash (data bus, memory-mapped via D-cache, read-only)

flash_ibus.description: Flash (instruction bus, memory-mapped via I-cache, read-only)
